name: NS MCP Server
description_en: Look up NS train departures and disruptions and plan train journeys.

name: ns-travel-mcp
description_en: Plan NS journeys and check real-time train data and disruption alerts.

name: anwb-mcp
description_en: Pull ANWB traffic incidents, plan routes with turn-by-turn directions, and search locations.

name: SB OGC MCP
description_en: Query Dutch mobility data through Studio Bereikbaar's OGC API — the CBS ODiN travel survey, national traffic-model networks, administrative boundaries, and accessibility maps.
Look up Dutch bus, tram, metro, and ferry departures from the OVapi real-time feed — search stops, find stops nearby, and inspect lines and journeys.
name: ovapi-mcp-server
schiphol-flights-mcp
description_en: Search Schiphol flights by date, route, airline, and time window through the official Flight API — a single endpoint, returning one page of results.
